Name: Twitch Viewer Counter Desk Display
Short description: The Twitch Viewer Counter is a tiny, always-on desk display that shows your live Twitch live viewers over Wi-Fi — big numbers, a next-milestone bar, and a daily-change ticker. No laptop, app, or phone. Ships pre-flashed with a 3D-printed stand.
Description:
The Twitch Viewer Counter puts your live Twitch live viewers right on your desk. It is a tiny, always-on Wi-Fi display with big readable numbers, a next-milestone progress bar, and a daily-change ticker — so every bit of growth feels real. No laptop, no app, no phone.

What your Twitch Viewer Counter shows

  • VIEWERS NOW — your live count, big and readable
  • NEXT MILESTONE — a progress bar to your next round number
  • NEXT MILESTONE — a progress bar to your next round number (1K, 10K, 50K...)
  • "+N today" — how much you have gained since it started watching
  • Refreshes automatically every minute over Wi-Fi
  • One-tap brightness and light/dark toggle

What you get

  • A pre-flashed Social Meter, ready to set up
  • A USB-C power cable
  • A 3D-printed desk stand
  • A printed setup card with a QR code to the step-by-step guide
  • Optional battery for cord-free placement

Setting up your Twitch Viewer Counter

Plug in -> join the device's Wi-Fi from your phone -> open the setup page -> pick Twitch and enter your channel name, plus a free API key -> enter your home Wi-Fi. Done. Our guided page walks you through it in about two minutes.

What you need

  • Your channel name
  • A free Twitch app key — client_id:client_secret joined by a colon (register a free app at dev.twitch.tv/console; shows 0 when you're offline)
  • 2.4 GHz home Wi-Fi (WPA2)

Private by design. Your details stay on the device — never uploaded to us or anyone. It only fetches public Twitch counts, over an encrypted connection. Wipe it with a button hold before regifting or reselling.

One device, many platforms. Prefer to track something else? Social Meter also counts YouTube, Twitch, Spotify, Bluesky, Mastodon, GitHub, npm, Docker Hub, Discord, Steam, Shopify, Etsy and Reddit — just pick your platform at setup.

The Twitch Viewer Counter is pre-flashed and ready — plug it in, join your Wi-Fi, and watch your live viewers climb.

* Social Meter is an independent hardware project by Encinitas 3D. Twitch is a trademark of Twitch Interactive, Inc.; this product is not made by, endorsed by, or affiliated with Twitch or Twitch Interactive, Inc..

The Reddit Subreddit Member Counter puts your live Reddit members right on your desk. It is a tiny, always-on Wi-Fi display with big readable numbers, a next-milestone progress bar, and a daily-change ticker — so every bit of growth feels real. No laptop, no app, no phone.

What your Reddit Subreddit Member Counter shows

  • MEMBERS — your live count, big and readable
  • ACTIVE — members active right now
  • NEXT MILESTONE — a progress bar to your next round number (10K, 100K, 1M...)
  • "+N today" — how much you have gained since it started watching
  • Refreshes automatically every minute over Wi-Fi
  • One-tap brightness and light/dark toggle

What you get

  • A pre-flashed Social Meter, ready to set up
  • A USB-C power cable
  • A 3D-printed desk stand
  • A printed setup card with a QR code to the step-by-step guide
  • Optional battery for cord-free placement

Setting up your Reddit Subreddit Member Counter

Plug in -> join the device's Wi-Fi from your phone -> open the setup page -> pick Reddit and enter the subreddit name (without r/) -> enter your home Wi-Fi. Done. Our guided page walks you through it in about two minutes.

What you need

  • The subreddit name (without r/)
  • No API key required — leave the key box blank
  • 2.4 GHz home Wi-Fi (WPA2)

Private by design. Your details stay on the device — never uploaded to us or anyone. It only fetches public Reddit counts, over an encrypted connection. Wipe it with a button hold before regifting or reselling.

One device, many platforms. Prefer to track something else? Social Meter also counts YouTube, Twitch, Spotify, Bluesky, Mastodon, GitHub, npm, Docker Hub, Discord, Steam, Shopify, Etsy and Reddit — just pick your platform at setup.

The Reddit Subreddit Member Counter is pre-flashed and ready — plug it in, join your Wi-Fi, and watch your members climb.

* Social Meter is an independent hardware project by Encinitas 3D. Reddit is a trademark of Reddit, Inc.; this product is not made by, endorsed by, or affiliated with Reddit or Reddit, Inc..
